news_items.headline: Soto fouls ball off right foot, later exits for Me...
news_items.summary: Mets manager Carlos Mendoza said X-rays came back negative on superstar Juan Soto, who was removed from Wednesday night's 3-2, extra-inning win over the Detroit Tigers after fouling a ball off his right foot.

news_items.headline: Fan at White Sox game injured in fall into bullpen...
news_items.summary: The Royals-White Sox game at Rate Field was delayed for a brief time Wednesday after a fan fell into the Kansas City bullpen in right field.

news_items.headline: Braves rally by Cubs, first in majors to 30 wins
news_items.summary: The Braves improved MLB's top record to 30-13 with another thrilling win Wednesday night, scoring three runs in the eighth inning to beat the Cubs 4-1.

news_items.headline: Misiorowski exits another gem due to cramping
news_items.summary: Brewers starter Jacob Misiorowski dominated the Padres for seven innings before leaving with a cramp in his right quadriceps, the second time in three starts that he has left due to cramping.

news_items.headline: Rockies' McCarthy turns rare unassisted DP for OF
news_items.summary: Jake McCarthy recorded the first unassisted double play by an outfielder in the big leagues since 2015, accomplishing the feat for the Colorado Rockies against the Pittsburgh Pirates on Wednesday.

news_items.headline: Yanks' Fried has sore elbow, set to undergo tests
news_items.summary: Yankees ace Max Fried was pulled from Wednesday's start against the Orioles after just three innings because of soreness in his pitching elbow.

news_items.headline: Mets' Alvarez tears meniscus as IL woes continue
news_items.summary: Francisco Alvarez will undergo surgery for a meniscus tear in his right knee, with Mets manager Carlos Mendoza hoping his catcher can return in six to eight weeks.

news_items.headline: Retired Heyward joins Dodgers as special assistant...
news_items.summary: Jason Heyward is back in baseball less than two months after retiring as a player, taking a job with the Dodgers as a special assistant in the baseball operations department.

news_items.headline: Dodgers 2026 game results
news_items.summary: Keeping track of every game this season, all in one place

news_items.headline: Shohei Ohtani, the pitcher-only version, breaks Dodgers losing streak with 7 scoreless innings, ERA down to 0.82
news_items.summary: The only Dodger in history with a better ERA through seven starts: Fernando Valenzuela.

news_items.headline: Shohei Ohtani’s gem helps Dodgers snap four-game losing skid
news_items.summary: Ohtani tosses six scoreless innings, Espinal and Betts go deep in 4-0 win over Giants.

news_items.summary: On a night where Carson Benge was the hero with his game-winning hit in the 10th inning against the Detroit Tigers, Christian Scott and the Mets’ bullpen should not be forgotten.

news_items.headline: Fan hospitalized after falling into bullpen at Rate Field during White Sox's win over Royals
news_items.summary: The game was briefly delayed in the fourth inning after the fan fell into the Royals' bullpen.

news_items.headline: ‘Resilient’ Carson Benge shakes off early error, delivers for Mets with walk-off hit
news_items.summary: It isn’t about how you start, it’s about how you finish -- Carson Benge showed that to the highest degree on Wednesday night, as he shook off a couple of rough moments early to deliver the Mets the game-winning hit.
